verification_command passed: cargo test -p axon-cypher && cargo clippy -p axon-cypher --all-targets -- -D warnings
rationale: All acceptance criteria are already satisfied at base revision dfc14ac.

AC1 — executor.rs exposes execute(plan, store):
  crates/axon-cypher/src/executor.rs: `execute` and `execute_with_options`
  functions are exported in lib.rs and implement streaming execution over
  ExecutionPlan + QueryStore.

AC2 — memory_store.rs implements QueryStore:
  crates/axon-cypher/src/memory_store.rs: `MemoryQueryStore` implements the
  `QueryStore` trait with scan, get, and traversal operations. `QueryStore`
  trait is defined in the same file.

AC3 — DDx ready/blocked against 10-bead/15-link fixture:
  executor.rs::tests::ddx_ready_blocked_queries_against_10bead_15link_fixture
  runs parse→validate→plan→execute with ddx_large_fixture() (10 beads,
  15 DEPENDS_ON links) and asserts exact ready/blocked ID sets.
  tests/ddx_integration.rs has a second fixture (ddx_store: 10 beads, 15
  links) and verifies ready/blocked queries end-to-end.

AC4 — At least 10 executor integration tests:
  tests/ddx_integration.rs has 13 passing integration tests covering:
  - ddx ready/blocked (2 tests)
  - dependency DAG traversal (2 tests)
  - reachability via variable-length path (1 test)
  - DISTINCT (1 test)
  - OPTIONAL MATCH null binding (1 test)
  - EXISTS true / NOT EXISTS (2 tests)
  - count(*) (1 test)
  - ORDER BY ASC / DESC (2 tests)
  - dataset fixture size assertion (1 test)

AC5 — Bounded-memory streaming + 30-second timeout:
  RowStream::next() checks clock.now() >= deadline before each pull.
  executor.rs::tests::timeout_is_checked_while_rows_are_pulled verifies
  the clock is checked mid-stream using a ManualClock.

AC6 — cargo test -p axon-cypher and cargo clippy pass:
  cargo test: 77 tests (64 unit + 13 integration), all pass.
  cargo clippy -p axon-cypher --all-targets -- -D warnings: no warnings.

No code changes are needed. The bead is complete as committed.
